result.stdout:
Usage: changelog [--output <String>] [--tag-prefix <String>] [--ignore-prereleases] [--ignore-scope] [--skip-title] [--show-hash] [--changelog-order <ChangelogOrder>] [--reference-commit <String>] [--help] [--version] repository-path

ConventionalChangelog

Arguments:
  0: repository-path     (Required)

Options:
  -o, --output <String>                     
  -t, --tag-prefix <String>                 
  -i, --ignore-prereleases                  
  -s, --ignore-scope                        
  -r, --skip-title                          
  -a, --show-hash                           
  -c, --changelog-order <ChangelogOrder>     (Allowed values: NewestToOldest, OldestToNewest)
  -x, --reference-commit <String>           
  -h, --help                                Show help message
  --version                                 Show version

commands.payload:
Usage: changelog [--output <String>] [--tag-prefix <String>] [--ignore-prereleases] [--ignore-scope] [--skip-title] [--show-hash] [--changelog-order <ChangelogOrder>] [--reference-commit <String>] [--help] [--version] repository-path

Arguments:
  0: repository-path     (Required)

Options:

  -t, --tag-prefix <String>                 
  -i, --ignore-prereleases                  
  -s, --ignore-scope                        
  -r, --skip-title                          
  -a, --show-hash                           
  -c, --changelog-order <ChangelogOrder>     (Allowed values: NewestToOldest, OldestToNewest)

  --version                                 Show version
